title: Morisonia steyermarkii

It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Morisonia steyermarkii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
